expectedAnswers: It's right at the front, past the snacks.
There's one near the dairy section on the left.
You can use the self-checkout kiosks by the exit doors.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确指出了收银台位置
语言准确性：语法正确，无重大错误

content.speakerText: Which line is moving fastest right now?
expectedAnswers: The self-checkout — only one person ahead.
The express lane, if you have under 10 items.
Avoid the cash-only line; the one with the teenager is quicker.

content.speakerText: I only have three items — should I use the express lane?
content.speakerTextCn: 我只有三件商品，我该用快速通道吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, definitely — the express lane is perfect for just a few items.
Absolutely! As long as you're under 10, it's the fastest option.
Yes, unless there's a long line — sometimes it's faster to just go to the regular counter.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：正确回应了是否使用快速通道的问题
